title: Module 1
introduction: This module focuses on the initial steps of myofunctional therapy. We'll start with active tongue exercises, sensory input, and your baseline breathing assessment.
objectives: Perform click and tick-tock exercises to strengthen tongue and mid face muscles
Complete tongue brushing for neuromuscular re-education
Practice tongue trace movements to stretch the frenum
Establish baseline breathing health with BOLT test
Maintain tongue-to-spot positioning with elastic hold exercise

exercises.name: Clicks and Tick-Tocks
exercises.description: If you have difficulty controlling compensations, use a bite block between your back teeth to stabilize your jaw while performing these exercises. The video demonstrates both the regular and modified techniques.

exercises.name: Brushing
exercises.description: Stick out tongue and brush full tongue 5 times. Brush 'the spot' area 5 times. Repeat for 1 minute total.

exercises.name: Tongue Trace
exercises.description: Tip of tongue against 'the spot' and trace back along the palate in a straight line.

exercises.name: BOLT Test
exercises.description: Measure your baseline breathing health. Record the time in seconds before the first sign of 'air hunger'.

exercises.name: Tongue Tip – One Elastic Hold
exercises.description: Place elastic on the tip of the tongue and hold it to 'the spot' for 5 minutes.

title: Module 1 (Week 2)
introduction: Now that you've found your spot, it's time to make your tongue stronger while keeping your cheeks relaxed.
objectives: Perform click and tick-tock exercises to strengthen tongue and mid face muscles
Complete tongue brushing for neuromuscular re-education
Practice tongue trace movements to stretch the frenum
Establish baseline breathing health with BOLT test
Maintain tongue-to-spot positioning with elastic hold exercise

exercises.name: Tongue Press
exercises.description: Press your tongue flat against the roof of your mouth for 3 seconds. Repeat 10 times.

exercises.name: Mirror Check
exercises.description: Repeat in front of a mirror, ensuring your cheeks stay relaxed.

title: Module 2
introduction: In this module, we advance to suction strength and deep breathing techniques. Mastering these is crucial for airway stability.
objectives: Strengthen posterior tongue muscles by practicing lingual palatal suction
Improve tongue coordination and tongue-mandible dissociation through tongue point exercise
Develop facial muscle tone and improve lip seal with cheek puffs
Practice diaphragmatic breathing
Maintain proper mid-tongue to palate positioning with elastic hold exercise

exercises.name: Lingual Palatal Suction
exercises.description: Suction tongue to roof and hold for as long as possible (10s to 1 min). Use a bite block if needed.

exercises.name: Tongue Points (Left and Right)
exercises.description: With neutral face, touch the smallest point of the tip of tongue to the corner of the mouth. Repeat for 2 minutes each side.

exercises.name: Cheek Puffs
exercises.description: Fill mouth with air and move to right, left, top lip, and bottom lip holding for 5 seconds each.

exercises.name: Belly/Diaphragm Breathing
exercises.description: Lie on back, hands on stomach and chest. Breathe into your belly so only your stomach moves.

exercises.name: Middle of Tongue – One Elastic Hold
exercises.description: Place elastic on the middle of the tongue and hold it to the roof of the mouth for 5 minutes.

title: Module 2 (Week 2)
introduction: This week is about lifting your tongue smoothly and evenly.
objectives: Strengthen posterior tongue muscles by practicing lingual palatal suction
Improve tongue coordination and tongue-mandible dissociation through tongue point exercise
Develop facial muscle tone and improve lip seal with cheek puffs
Practice diaphragmatic breathing
Maintain proper mid-tongue to palate positioning with elastic hold exercise

exercises.name: Full Tongue Lift
exercises.description: Press the entire tongue against the palate for 5 seconds, repeat 10 times.

exercises.name: Cheek Control
exercises.description: Watch in a mirror to keep cheeks from moving.

title: Module 3
introduction: This module introduces sound patterns and more complex lip/tongue coordination drills.
objectives: Strengthen lateral tongue muscles, improve coordination of the tongue and encourage tongue-mandible dissociation through tongue in cheek exercise
Improve posterior tongue elevation with K sounds
Improve tongue coordination, lip seal strength and tongue-mandible dissociation with tongue trace
Establish the 4-7-8 breathing pattern
Maintain proper mid-tongue to palate positioning with elastic hold exercise for an extended time

exercises.name: Tongue in Cheek
exercises.description: Push tongue into cheek for 5 seconds without jaw shift. Keep face relaxed. 1 minute 2x daily.

exercises.name: K Sounds (Kuh, Guh, Unk)
exercises.description: Make precise Kuh sounds with mouth open. Focus on back of tongue touching the soft palate.

exercises.name: Lip Trace
exercises.description: With lips closed, trace circles around the inside of the upper and lower lips. 1 minute 2x daily.

exercises.name: 4-7-8 Breathing Pattern
exercises.description: Inhale 4s, Hold 7s, Exhale 8s. Repeat for 5 minutes.

exercises.name: Middle of Tongue – One Elastic Hold
exercises.description: Increased duration: Hold elastic on middle of tongue for 10 minutes.

title: Module 3 (Week 2)
introduction: This week we retrain your swallow.
objectives: Strengthen lateral tongue muscles, improve coordination of the tongue and encourage tongue-mandible dissociation through tongue in cheek exercise
Improve posterior tongue elevation with K sounds
Improve tongue coordination, lip seal strength and tongue-mandible dissociation with tongue trace
Establish the 4-7-8 breathing pattern
Maintain proper mid-tongue to palate positioning with elastic hold exercise for an extended time

exercises.name: Spot Swallow
exercises.description: Keep tongue on the spot while swallowing, feel throat muscles (not chin) working.

exercises.name: Water Sips
exercises.description: Take small sips, repeat correct swallow each time.

title: Module 4
introduction: This module prepares you for your procedure by mastering essential suction and stretching techniques.
objectives: Master the lingual palatal suction hold for 60 seconds (most important pre-frenectomy exercise)
Develop awareness of tongue overflow patterns
Learn manual stretching and release techniques
Recognize and reduce over-breathing habits
Improve tongue coordination, lip seal strength and tongue-mandible dissociation with tongue trace
Maintain proper mid-tongue to palate positioning with elastic hold exercise for an extended time

exercises.name: Cave Suction
exercises.description: Deep suction hold. Aim for 60 seconds of silent suction.

exercises.name: Lip Pulls
exercises.description: Gently pull lips away from teeth while maintaining lip seal. 10 reps.

exercises.name: Gargle
exercises.description: Gargle water to improve posterior tongue and soft palate coordination.

title: Module 4 (Week 2)
introduction: Maintaining nasal breathing even during activity.
objectives: Master the lingual palatal suction hold for 60 seconds (most important pre-frenectomy exercise)
Develop awareness of tongue overflow patterns
Learn manual stretching and release techniques
Recognize and reduce over-breathing habits
Improve tongue coordination, lip seal strength and tongue-mandible dissociation with tongue trace
Maintain proper mid-tongue to palate positioning with elastic hold exercise for an extended time

exercises.name: Walking Nose Breathing
exercises.description: Walk 5 minutes breathing only through your nose, lips sealed.

exercises.name: BOLT Practice
exercises.description: Measure BOLT score once per day, note changes.

title: Module 5
introduction: Initial healing and gentle mobility after the procedure.
objectives: Wound check after surgery with surgeon
Complete daily gentle ROM exercises as instructed by surgeon
Resume tongue brushing and floor of mouth massage

exercises.name: Gentle Tongue Lift (Days 1-3)
exercises.description: Slowly and gently lift the tip of your tongue toward the roof of your mouth. Stop if you feel any significant discomfort. Repeat 5 times, 3x daily.

exercises.name: Gentle Side Traces (Days 1-3)
exercises.description: Slowly move your tongue toward the corners of your mouth. Keep it very gentle. 5 times per side, 3x daily.

exercises.name: Lingual Palatal Suction (Days 4-7)
exercises.description: If comfortable, begin light suction to the roof of the mouth. Hold for 3-5 seconds. Repeat 5 times.

exercises.name: Floor of Mouth Massage (Days 4-7)
exercises.description: Using clean hands, gently massage the floor of the mouth under the tongue to encourage blood flow and healing.

title: Module 6
introduction: Resuming routine and re-introducing mobility stretches.
objectives: Increase range of motion post-surgery
Begin surgical-specific stretches
Establish nighttime nasal breathing habit

exercises.name: Tongue Stretch (Post-Op)
exercises.description: Slowly extend your tongue toward the spot and then further back along the palate. Hold for 5 seconds. Repeat 10 times.

exercises.name: Forklift Stretch
exercises.description: Place two fingers under the sides of your tongue and gently lift it straight up toward the roof of the mouth. Hold the stretch for 5-10 seconds.

exercises.name: Mouth Taping (Nighttime)
exercises.description: Apply a small piece of medical tape vertically across the center of your lips before sleep to ensure you breathe through your nose all night.

exercises.name: Suction Hold (Extended)
exercises.description: Perform the Lingual Palatal Suction and hold for as long as comfortable, aiming for 15-20 seconds.

title: Module 7
introduction: Restoring proper function and linking habits into daily life.
objectives: Strengthen tongue muscles with suction on spot/hold
Refine swallowing technique to transition to soft foods
Practice counting 1-10 with tip of tongue on spot
Restore proper breathing habits after surgery including nasal unblocking and BOLT score measuring
Maintain proper mid-tongue to palate positioning with elastic hold exercise for an extended time

exercises.name: Meal Practice
exercises.description: During meals, pause to check lip seal and proper swallow.

exercises.name: Conversation Breathing
exercises.description: Between sentences, breathe calmly through your nose.

exercises.name: Counting Drill
exercises.description: Count 1-10 while keeping the tip of the tongue on the spot.

title: Module 7 (Week 2)
introduction: Reviewing progress and maintaining control.
objectives: Strengthen tongue muscles with suction on spot/hold
Refine swallowing technique to transition to soft foods
Practice counting 1-10 with tip of tongue on spot
Restore proper breathing habits after surgery including nasal unblocking and BOLT score measuring
Maintain proper mid-tongue to palate positioning with elastic hold exercise for an extended time

exercises.name: Posture Scan
exercises.description: Check resting tongue, lips, and breathing every hour today.

exercises.name: Midpoint Video
exercises.description: Record yourself doing tongue-to-spot hold and a correct swallow.

title: Module 8
introduction: Adding strength and intensity to your exercises.
objectives: Improve muscle tone through practicing suction pops
Practice tongue trace movements to improve coordination and improve frenum mobility
Refine swallowing technique to transition to whole food groups
Establish proper breathing patterns during conversation
Maintain proper whole tongue to palate positioning with elastic hold exercise for an extended time

exercises.name: Suction Pops
exercises.description: Suction tongue and release with a loud 'pop'. 10 times.

exercises.name: Power Hold
exercises.description: Press tongue strongly against palate for 7 seconds, 10 reps.

title: Module 8 (Week 2)
introduction: Speaking and breathing synchronization.
objectives: Improve muscle tone through practicing suction pops
Practice tongue trace movements to improve coordination and improve frenum mobility
Refine swallowing technique to transition to whole food groups
Establish proper breathing patterns during conversation
Maintain proper whole tongue to palate positioning with elastic hold exercise for an extended time

exercises.name: Read Aloud Drill
exercises.description: Read aloud for 5 minutes, pause with lips closed, breathe through nose.

title: Module 9
introduction: Advanced control and endurance.
objectives: Strengthen tongue and build endurance through suction clicks
Incorporate proper breathing while speaking
Refine swallowing technique to transition to difficult whole foods like chicken and raw vegetables
Maintain proper whole tongue to palate positioning with two elastics hold exercise for an extended time

exercises.name: Suction Clicks
exercises.description: Repeated fast suction and release clicks. 1 minute.

exercises.name: Difficult Foods Training
exercises.description: Practice swallowing difficult foods (chicken, raw veg) with correct technique.

title: Module 9 (Week 2)
introduction: Chewing and swallowing refinement.
objectives: Strengthen tongue and build endurance through suction clicks
Incorporate proper breathing while speaking
Refine swallowing technique to transition to difficult whole foods like chicken and raw vegetables
Maintain proper whole tongue to palate positioning with two elastics hold exercise for an extended time

exercises.name: Chewing Practice
exercises.description: Chew food slowly, tongue stays up, lips together.

exercises.name: Correct Swallow Drill
exercises.description: 10 practice swallows, tongue on spot, no cheek movement.

title: Module 10
introduction: Maximum endurance and breathing efficiency.
objectives: Establish proper swallowing of liquids and solids without any compensations
Finalize proper tongue posture and lip seal habits
Consolidate new breathing habits
Maintain proper whole tongue to palate positioning with two elastics hold exercise for an extended time

exercises.name: Nose Walk
exercises.description: Walk 10 minutes nose-only breathing, lips sealed.

title: Module 10 (Week 2)
introduction: Integrating the swallow automatically into daily life.
objectives: Establish proper swallowing of liquids and solids without any compensations
Finalize proper tongue posture and lip seal habits
Consolidate new breathing habits
Maintain proper whole tongue to palate positioning with two elastics hold exercise for an extended time

exercises.name: Automaticity Check
exercises.description: Randomly check posture/swallow 10 times a day; ensure it's correct.

title: Module 11
introduction: Consolidating all habits and finalizing technique.
objectives: Finalize proper swallowing of liquids and solids without any compensations
Consolidate new breathing habits
Maintain proper whole tongue to palate positioning with two elastics hold exercise for an extended time

exercises.name: All-Skills-Together
exercises.description: Practice conversation, eating, and breathing simultaneously with correct form.

title: Module 11 (Week 2)
introduction: Challenge week: testing endurance under pressure.
objectives: Finalize proper swallowing of liquids and solids without any compensations
Consolidate new breathing habits
Maintain proper whole tongue to palate positioning with two elastics hold exercise for an extended time

exercises.name: Endurance Suction
exercises.description: Hold suction for 45 seconds. 5 reps.

title: Module 12
introduction: Final mastery: living the program.
objectives: Ensure no compensations or old habits have resurfaced
Consolidate and maintain proper nasal breathing, lip seal, tongue posture and chewing and swallowing technique

exercises.name: Social Awareness
exercises.description: Maintain posture during 1 solid hour of social interaction.

title: Module 12 (Week 2)
introduction: Maintenance focus: effortless rhythm.
objectives: Ensure no compensations or old habits have resurfaced
Consolidate and maintain proper nasal breathing, lip seal, tongue posture and chewing and swallowing technique

exercises.name: Effortless Posture
exercises.description: Hold correct posture for 2 hours with minimal checking.

title: Module 13
introduction: Final review and graduation rehearsal.
objectives: Ensure no compensations or old habits have resurfaced
Consolidate and maintain proper nasal breathing, lip seal, tongue posture and chewing and swallowing technique

exercises.name: Combo Review
exercises.description: Review all exercises from previous modules; ensure perfection.

title: Module 13 (Week 2)
introduction: Graduation: showcasing your transformation.
objectives: Ensure no compensations or old habits have resurfaced
Consolidate and maintain proper nasal breathing, lip seal, tongue posture and chewing and swallowing technique

exercises.name: Final Graduation Show
exercises.description: Record your final results video.
